commands.allowedCommands.description: Commands that can be automatically executed when 'Always approve execute operations' is enabled
commands.commandExecutionTimeout.descrip: Maximum time in seconds to wait for command execution to complete before timing out (0 = no timeout, 1-600s, default: 0s)
commands.commandTimeoutAllowlist.descrip: Command prefixes that are excluded from command execution timeout. Commands matching these prefixes will run without timeout restrictions.
commands.deniedCommands.description: Command prefixes that are automatically denied without asking for approval. When conflicting with allowed commands, the longest prefix match takes precedence. Add * to deny all commands.
Prevent task completion when there are incomplete todos in the todo list
settings.apiRequestTimeout.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for API responses (0 = no timeout, 1-3600s, default: 600s). Higher values are recommended for local providers like LM Studio and Ollama that may require more processing time.
settings.autoImportSettingsPath.descript: Path to a Shofer configuration file that will be automatically imported on extension startup. Supports absolute paths and paths relative to home directory (e.g., '~/Documents/shofer-code-settings.json'). Leave empty to disable auto-import.
settings.codeIndex.embeddingBatchSize.de: The batch size for embedding operations during code indexing. Adjust this to match your API provider's limits. Default is 60.
settings.customStoragePath.description: Custom storage path. Leave empty to use the default storage location. Supports absolute paths (e.g., 'D:\ShoferStorage')
settings.debug.description: Enable debug mode to show additional buttons for viewing the API conversation history and UI messages as formatted JSON in temporary files.
settings.debugProxy.enabled.description: Enable debug proxy — Route all outgoing network requests through a proxy for MITM debugging. Only active when running in debug mode (F5).
settings.debugProxy.serverUrl.descriptio: Proxy URL (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8888). Only used when debug proxy is enabled.
settings.debugProxy.tlsInsecure.descript: Accept self-signed certificates from the proxy. Required for MITM inspection. Use only for local debugging.
settings.enableCodeActions.description: Enable Shofer Quick Fix code actions.
settings.enableLlmProviderIntegration.de: Enable integration with the Shofer LLM Model Provider extension (requires llm-provider to be installed). When enabled, the vscode-lm provider queries shofer.llm.getModelPricing and shofer.llm.getRequestCost for per-token pricing and per-conversation cost tracking — required for cost-limit enforcement and accurate API Cost display. When disabled (default), only token counts are available.
settings.maximumIndexedFilesForFileSearc: Maximum number of files to index for the @-file search feature. Higher values provide better search results in large projects but may consume more memory. Default: 10000.
settings.newTaskRequireTodos.description: Require todos parameter when creating new tasks with the new_task tool
settings.vsCodeLmModelSelector.descripti: Settings for the VSCode Language Model API
settings.vsCodeLmModelSelector.family.de: The family of the language model (e.g., gpt-4)
settings.vsCodeLmModelSelector.vendor.de: The vendor of the language model (e.g., copilot)
configuration.title: Shofer Configuration
walkthrough.title: Get Started with Shofer
walkthrough.install.description: Install Shofer and open the sidebar to get started.
walkthrough.selectMode.description:
Select a mode that fits your task:

- **Code**: For writing and editing code.
- **Architect**: For planning and design.
- **Ask**: For getting answers to questions.
- **Debug**: For investigating and fixing issues.
walkthrough.selectModel.description: Choose an AI model and provider for Shofer to use. You can configure this later in the Settings panel.
walkthrough.startTask.description: Type a message to Shofer in the chat to get started on your first task!
walkthrough.settings.description: Configure Shofer to your liking — adjust providers, modes, prompts, and more.
walkthrough.documentation.title: Learn More
walkthrough.documentation.description: Visit the Shofer documentation for in-depth guides and tutorials.
walkthrough.feedback.title: Send Feedback
walkthrough.feedback.description: Help us improve Shofer by sharing your thoughts and suggestions.
walkthrough.community.title: Join the Community
walkthrough.community.description: Connect with other Shofer users on Discord and Reddit.
walkthrough.marketplace.title: Explore the Marketplace
walkthrough.marketplace.description: Browse and install MCP servers and custom modes from the Shofer Marketplace.
walkthrough.copilotUsers.title: Migrating from GitHub Copilot
walkthrough.copilotUsers.description: Coming from Copilot? Shofer gives you full model choice, local-first privacy, parallel tasks, and 50+ native tools.
walkthrough.roocodeUsers.title: Migrating from Roo-Code
walkthrough.roocodeUsers.description: Roo-Code is sunsetting — Shofer is the natural migration path with parallel tasks, async MCP, semantic search, and worktree support.
